# Model note — story-<id>

<!--
Phase-0 output (CLAUDE.md § 6.1 phase 0, R24). Co-designed by the user and the
main-session dialogue, with ddd-modeler (Mode A) supplying candidate shapes.
Keep it to ~1 page. Copy to docs/domain/model-notes/story-<id>.md.
Stories with no Core domain-concept impact skip this file entirely and declare
`No model impact — <reason>` in the plan's Domain-model section instead.
-->
